instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `aes_all`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: ggplot2 v4.0.2.9000
Description: Create Elegant Data Visualisations Using the Grammar of Graphics
Function: aes_all
Parameters: vars
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal

Function Code:
```r
aes_all <- function(vars) {
  names(vars) <- vars
  vars <- rename_aes(vars)

  # Quosure the symbols in the empty environment because they can only
  # refer to the data mask
  x <- class_mapping(lapply(vars, function(x) new_quosure(as.name(x), emptyenv())))
  add_class(x, "unlabelled")
}
```
